channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 50 Millham Road, 10th April
item.description:
Portable toilet on footpath. Multiple vans blocking pavement. This has been continuous for months. The noise far exceeds acceptable. Pavements blocked daily.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birchfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: From the race course roundabout to Tommy Taylor’s Road , Swindon Lane is full of deep wide potholes that are a hazard for cyclists and motorists. When is the council going to fix them? It is scandalous that Cheltenham roads are in such poor condition and nothing is being done., 10th April
item.description:
From the race course roundabout to Tommy Taylor’s Road there are multiple potholes that have been there nearly an year and getting bigger. It is a threat to cyclists falling off and motorists getting punctures. My daughter replaced her tyre and 24hrs later went through another pothole in the dark and had to replace the tyre again. When is this road going to be repaired please? Before the races would have been a good time as it is now worse. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 9th April
item.description:
Lane 1. 1 meter across. 15cm deep. Mile marker M5 B 88.2.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothing Flytipped at the back of Churchdown Club in TBC car park, 9th April
item.description:
Overflowing clothing recycling bins and Flytipped clothes in the Chapel Hay Car Park, Churchdown

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapel Hay Close, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several craters around mini roundabout, superficial repair when a bucket of tarmac was pressed into one of the craters.This has deteriorated once again.Please can warning signs, raised iron work signs, Danger uneven surface etc signs be placed here., 9th April
item.description:
Mini roundabout…Parton Road junction with Station Road and entrance to Churchdown PC offices.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole at the entrance of Leckhampton hill car park, 9th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Coberley, Cotswold

item.title: Massive potholes everywhere, 9th April
item.description:
Because of the way cars are parked it makes it hard to avoid and people constantly cross out infront of you which makes it hard to avoid people and potholes very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Gloucester Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
